Submodules

src.osir_lib.osir_lib.modules.windows.anssi_decode module

src.osir_lib.osir_lib.modules.windows.anssi_decode.ANSSI_Decode(case_path: str, module: OsirModule)[source]

PyModule to apply DECODE tool on NTFS_info files with Listdlls when available.

src.osir_lib.osir_lib.modules.windows.extract_orc module

src.osir_lib.osir_lib.modules.windows.extract_orc.ORC_Extractor(case_path: str, module: OsirModule)[source]

Extends PyModule to perform extraction operations for DFIR ORC archives, maintaining directory structures and handling nested archives.

src.osir_lib.osir_lib.modules.windows.powershell_history module

src.osir_lib.osir_lib.modules.windows.powershell_history.PowerShellHistoryParser(case_path: str, module: OsirModule) → None[source]

Parse Windows Powershell history file.

src.osir_lib.osir_lib.modules.windows.wer module

src.osir_lib.osir_lib.modules.windows.wer.WerParser(case_path: str, module: OsirModule) → None[source]

Parse Windows WER files under an input path and export a single JSONL file.

This module walks the provided input directory and parses each WER report.

src.osir_lib.osir_lib.modules.windows.win_memory module

src.osir_lib.osir_lib.modules.windows.win_memory.Memory_Processor(case_path: str, module: OsirModule)[source]

Extends PyModule to run parsing of Windows memory dump using memprocfs.
